title: Set up Firebase Authentication in a Next.js App Router project
summary: Install Firebase SDK, configure client and Admin SDK, implement sign-in with Google/Email, protect server routes with ID token verification, and sync auth state in React.
declaration: I will set up Firebase Authentication for your Next.js project. This uses the Firebase client SDK for browser-side auth flows and Firebase Admin SDK for server-side token verification. If you prefer Auth.js, Clerk, or Lucia, say so before I begin.
